name: Mid-City Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Mid-City Jewelry & Loan is a pawn shop in Omaha offering collateral-based loans and jewelry/precious metal transactions at 515 S 15th St.
description_long:
Mid-City Jewelry & Loan operates as a traditional pawn shop located in central Omaha, Nebraska at 515 S 15th St in the 68102 zip code. The business has been established in the community and maintains regular operating hours throughout the week. Like other pawn operations, the company provides collateral-based lending services where customers can pledge items of value in exchange for immediate cash loans.

Based on the available information, Mid-City Jewelry & Loan offers pawn shop services typical to the industry, including the ability to pledge jewelry, precious metals, and other items of value as collateral for short-term loans. The business appears to focus on jewelry and loan services as indicated by its name, suggesting specialization in precious metals and jewelry transactions.

Mid-City Jewelry & Loan distinguishes itself through its longstanding presence in Omaha's downtown area and consistent business hours that accommodate weekday customers. The business maintains direct phone contact at (402) 341-5466 for customer inquiries about loan terms, appraisals, or jewelry transactions.

Prospective customers should understand that pawn loans involve giving up physical possession of items until the loan is repaid, and that loan terms, interest rates, and redemption periods are subject to Nebraska state pawn regulations. The company's website presence is limited to directory listings, which restricts detailed information about specific loan terms, fees, APR rates, or redemption policies. Customers should contact the business directly to understand the complete terms before pledging items.
pros: Located in downtown Omaha with consistent weekday hours (9 AM - 4 PM Monday-Friday)
Direct phone line available at (402) 341-5466 for customer inquiries
Established pawn shop with physical presence in the community
Offers immediate cash access through collateral-based lending
Specializes in jewelry and precious metals, suggesting expertise in valuation
Open 5 days per week with predictable business hours for working customers
cons: Requires surrendering physical possession of personal items until loan repayment
Limited information available about APR rates, fees, or loan term specifics
No online presence or website with transparent pricing and policies
Closed on weekends and evenings, limiting accessibility for some customers
Pawn loans involve risk of losing items if unable to repay within redemption period
best_for: Customers who need immediate cash and have jewelry or precious metals to pledge
People seeking short-term loans without credit checks or income verification
Individuals looking to sell or appraise jewelry and precious metals
diagnosis: Mid-City Jewelry & Loan is best for customers in the Omaha area who have jewelry or precious metals to pledge and need immediate cash without a credit check. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering your items for the loan period, and lack of detailed online information means you must contact them directly to understand all terms and fees before proceeding.
services: Pawn loans secured by jewelry and precious metals
Purchase of gold, silver, and other precious metals
